turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, this is Geeta Sawant. I want to reschedule my appointment. I booked it for this Saturday but I have a function at home.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No worries, Ms. Sawant! Could you confirm the phone number on your booking?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. You have an appointment with Dr. Mohan Gaikwad in general medicine this Saturday at 10 AM. When would you like to move it to?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can we do the following Monday? Or even Tuesday?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Monday at 10:30 AM is available with Dr. Gaikwad. Would that work?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great, your appointment has been moved to Monday at 10:30 AM with Dr. Mohan Gaikwad. An updated confirmation will reach you on your registered number.
